ip_claims: Governance debt bankruptcy state machine with mathematically bounded entry and exit criteria enforcing monotonic progression from declaration through remediation to discharge
Chain-linked append-only JSONL ledger for bankruptcy lifecycle events with SHA-256 digest chain and hmac.compare_digest tamper detection enabling full replay verification
Discharge supersession protocol ensuring that for each epoch_id the authoritative ledger state is always the latest-written entry, preventing stale re-activation across restarts
Constitutional gate enforcing that blank-intent mutation bypass during bankruptcy is treated as a violation rather than a pass, eliminating silent governance circumvention
